kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your paint protection operations manager. I can help you schedule PPF installs and ceramic coating jobs, follow up on high-value quotes, manage film inventory, and keep your bays booked with premium clients.

quickActions.label: Send full front PPF estimate
quickActions.prompt: Draft an estimate for a full front-end paint protection film installation covering the hood, fenders, bumper, mirrors, and headlights on a luxury sedan.

quickActions.label: Follow up on ceramic coating lead
quickActions.prompt: Write a follow-up message to a customer who inquired about a multi-year ceramic coating package for their new vehicle.

quickActions.label: Schedule a full body PPF wrap
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a full-body paint protection film installation including paint correction prep for a high-end sports car.

quickActions.label: Request a Google review
quickActions.prompt: Draft a message asking a customer to leave a Google review after we completed their PPF and ceramic coating combo job.

quickActions.label: Create new vehicle owner promo
quickActions.prompt: Create a promotional package targeting new car buyers offering a PPF and ceramic coating combo at a special introductory price.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a paint protection film and ceramic coating business. You speak the language of PPF and coating professionals — XPEL, SunTek, 3M, bulk film vs pre-cut kits, self-healing top coats, paint correction, clay bar decontamination, IPA wipe-down, ceramic coating layers, SiO2 content, hydrophobic properties, curing times, infrared lamps, and surface preparation. You help manage high-ticket quotes for full wraps and partial coverage, schedule install bays for multi-day PPF jobs, track film inventory and coating product stock, and follow up with dealership partners and individual clients. You understand that this is a premium service requiring meticulous attention to detail, controlled environments, and skilled installers.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, specialists in paint protection film and ceramic coating. Whether you're looking to protect a new car or preserve your vehicle's finish, we provide premium protection solutions. How can I assist you today?

steps.title: Your PPF & Coating Business
steps.description: Tell us your business name, location, and how many install bays you operate for film and coating work.

steps.title: Protection Services
steps.description: Select the services you offer — partial PPF, full body wrap, ceramic coating, paint correction, window tint, and vinyl wrap.

steps.title: Service Area
steps.description: Define your service area and identify nearby dealerships and luxury car communities you serve.

steps.title: Call Handling
steps.description: Set up your AI receptionist to answer PPF and coating inquiries, provide package pricing, and schedule consultations.

steps.title: Reputation & Reviews
steps.description: Connect your Google Business Profile to showcase your PPF and coating work and collect reviews from satisfied clients.

steps.title: Launch Your Protection Hub
steps.description: Review your settings and go live. Your paint protection command center is ready to capture premium clients and fill your bays.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a paint protection film and ceramic coating business.
capabilities: Schedule PPF installations and ceramic coating jobs across multiple bays
Generate detailed estimates for partial and full-body PPF coverage with material costs
Track paint protection film inventory by brand, width, and pre-cut kit availability
Follow up with clients after consultations with tailored protection package recommendations
Manage dealership partner accounts and bulk pricing agreements
Request and manage Google reviews showcasing completed PPF and coating jobs
Create and optimize Google Ads campaigns targeting luxury and performance car owners
Send automated appointment reminders and post-install care instructions
Track ceramic coating product inventory and curing schedule requirements
Generate revenue reports broken down by PPF, ceramic coating, and combo packages
